intent: Fix Library.tsx upstream defaults so 'all' mode (mixed audiobook + ebook) is reachable. Three paths blocked it: activeModeLabel defaulted to audiobooks, modeBooksForMedia returned only audiobooks when format unset, empty-state switch-format logic used string comparisons instead of activeFormatTab enum.

findings.title: Missing E2E regression tests for single-format auto-filter behavior
findings.suggestedFix: Add two E2E tests: one seeding only audiobooks (verify auto-filter shows audiobooks tab), one seeding only ebooks (verify auto-filter shows ebooks tab). Follow existing `tabSeedsWithMixedAudiobook()` pattern with seed helpers from tests/utils/test-seeds.
findings.whyItMatters: The auto-filter effect is critical for single-format UX. Without regression tests, a future change to the effect could silently break single-format defaulting (e.g., showing all books in the Hero when only audiobooks exist).
evidence: tests/e2e/library-tabs.spec.ts:191-231 only covers mixed-format library scenarios
chooseFirstEmptyFormatDefault() has unit tests but no E2E coverage for the full effect pipeline

findings.title: Weak E2E assertion for Books badge — not targetted to specific element
findings.suggestedFix: Add a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="library-media-hero-badge"`) to the badge span in LibraryMediaHero.tsx line 109, then update the assertion to `await expect(page.getByTestId('library-media-hero-badge')).toContainText('Books')`.
findings.whyItMatters: Current assertion `toContainText('Books')` on the hero container is loose — if 'Books' text appears elsewhere in the hero (title, description), the test passes spuriously.
evidence: src/app/components/library/LibraryMediaHero.tsx:108-111 — the badge is a plain span without testid
The hero contains multiple text elements (title, author, description) where 'Books' could accidentally appear

findings.title: Unrelated storage-setup.sql change adds scope creep
findings.suggestedFix: Remove the storage-setup.sql change from this PR and submit it separately, or document in the PR description that it is intentional adjacent cleanup.
findings.whyItMatters: The storage-setup.sql change (DELETE policy for learning-path-covers) is unrelated to the ebook library visibility fix. Combining concerns makes review harder and increases revert risk.
evidence: git diff shows a supabase/storage-setup.sql hunk adding DELETE policy for learning-path-covers
The plan at docs/plans/2026-05-07-008-fix-ebook-library-visibility-plan.md scopes changes to Library.tsx only

findings.title: Connect ABS button shows in 'all' mode for ebook-only library after clearing filter
findings.suggestedFix: Refine the gate from `activeFormatTab !== 'ebooks'` to also check library inventory: `activeFormatTab !== 'ebooks' && !(activeFormatTab === 'all' && !libraryHasAudiobooks(books))`. Or accept as intentional (Connect ABS is not harmful even with ebooks only).
findings.whyItMatters: When a user has only ebooks and clears the format chip, the Connect ABS button appears despite no audiobooks existing. Old behavior (via activeModeLabel === 'Audiobooks') would not show it. Risk is low — connecting ABS does nothing bad — but it may confuse ebook-only users.
evidence: Old code: `{activeModeLabel === 'Audiobooks' && (...Connect ABS...)` — only showed in audiobook mode
New code: `{activeFormatTab !== 'ebooks' && (...Connect ABS...)` — shows in 'all' mode too
When auto-filter is cleared on ebook-only library, activeFormatTab = 'all', no audiobooks exist

residualRisks: The widening logic (lines 452-480) could race with a rapid addition-and-removal of the opposite modality during sync, but this is unlikely in practice
SessionStorage format-cleared flag persists across page loads — a user who cleared once never gets auto-filter defaults again until they clear storage
testingGaps: No E2E coverage for empty-state switch-format button text
No E2E coverage for single-format library defaulting (regression risk)
No E2E coverage for library with zero books (edge case: empty library should not crash)

requirementsCompleteness.R1: met — auto-filter leaves format unset when both formats exist; modeBooksForMedia returns all books
requirementsCompleteness.R2: met — single-format auto-filter still applies via chooseFirstEmptyFormatDefault
requirementsCompleteness.R3: met — no changes to LibraryFormatModeTabs component
requirementsCompleteness.Unit1: met — pre-existing via chooseFirstEmptyFormatDefault helper library (effect had no changes needed)
requirementsCompleteness.Unit2: met — activeModeLabel defaults to 'Books'; modeBooksForMedia returns all books on unset; switch-format uses activeFormatTab
